changeSet.author: Thang
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `authors` ( `id` bigint primary key auto_increment, `full_name` varchar(120) not null, `pen_name` varchar(80), `country` varchar(100), `status` enum('ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE') not null default 'ACTIVE', `short_description` varchar(500), `created_at` datetime not null default current_timestamp, `updated_at` datetime not null default current_timestamp on update current_timestamp );
